channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: US on track for historically low homicide rate in 2026, report finds
item.description: A Council on Criminal Justice report shows an 18% drop in homicides across 30 US cities in 2025 compared to the same period.

item.title: State lawmaker arrested on federal charges of sexual abuse involving a minor
item.description: West Virginia Republican Delegate David Elliott Pritt faces sexual assault charges after allegedly using Snapchat to interact with a minor.

item.title: OpenAI models go rogue during training exercise
item.description: OpenAI is investigating after two AI bots targeted an outside company during a training exercise.

item.title: Videos show Tropical Storm Bertha's impact on Gulf Coast
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha made landfall in Louisiana, causing dangerous surf and coastal flooding.
